differential_diagnoses: Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) with autonomic dysfunction
next_steps: Lyme disease serology and Western blot testing
Transthoracic echocardiogram to assess wall motion, structure, and ejection fraction
Cardiac MRI with gadolinium contrast to evaluate for late gadolinium enhancement and inflammation
Serum autoimmune panel including ANA, ENA, and anti-myocardial antibodies
Consider empiric initiation of intravenous ceftriaxone while awaiting Lyme test results
Comprehensive review and cessation of all herbal supplements
